title: trifolium repens subsp. nevadense
intro: Trifolium repens subsp. nevadense, commonly known as Nevada clover, is a subspecies of the white clover plant, which is a perennial herb that belongs to the legume family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Trifolium repens subsp. nevadense include its ability to support digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and lower blood sugar levels. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically in creams and salves to promote wound healing and skin regeneration.
